scenes.name: Aircraft Cockpit
scenes.description: The flight deck featuring advanced avionics and instrumentation panels.

inspectionZones.label: Primary Flight Display
inspectionZones.description: Shows altitude, airspeed, heading, and vertical speed.

inspectionZones.label: Engine Instruments
inspectionZones.description: N1, N2, EGT, and fuel flow gauges for both engines.

annotation.title: Glass Cockpit Avionics
annotation.description: The Boeing 787 features a Honeywell glass cockpit with large-format LCD displays replacing traditional analog instruments. The Primary Flight Display (PFD) integrates attitude, altitude, airspeed, and navigation data into a single intuitive view, reducing pilot workload during all phases of flight.

scenes.name: First Class Cabin
scenes.description: Luxurious seating with premium amenities and personal suites.

inspectionZones.label: Personal Suite
inspectionZones.description: Fully enclosed suite with sliding door, lie-flat bed, and 23-inch entertainment screen.

annotation.title: First Class Suite
annotation.description: Each suite features a lie-flat bed with premium bedding, personal wardrobe, vanity mirror with adjustable lighting, noise-canceling headphones, and a dining table for two. Passengers enjoy direct aisle access regardless of seat position.

scenes.name: Business Class Cabin
scenes.description: Spacious lie-flat seats with direct aisle access and ambient lighting.

inspectionZones.label: IFE System
inspectionZones.description: 18-inch touchscreen with 1000+ hours of content, Wi-Fi, and USB-C charging.

annotation.title: In-Flight Entertainment
annotation.description: The Panasonic eX3 system powers 18-inch 1080p screens at every seat. Content includes live TV, movies, music, games, and a moving map. Bluetooth audio pairing and Wi-Fi connectivity are standard.

scenes.name: Economy Class Cabin
scenes.description: Standard seating configuration with overhead bins and entertainment screens.

inspectionZones.label: Overhead Bins
inspectionZones.description: Redesigned stow bins hold 50% more luggage with easy one-hand operation.

annotation.title: LED Mood Lighting
annotation.description: The 787's electrochromatic windows and customizable LED lighting system simulates natural daylight cycles, reducing jet lag. Cabin crew can select from 16 million color combinations to create ambiance appropriate for meals, sleep, or arrival.

scenes.name: Galley / Service Area
scenes.description: The onboard kitchen and service preparation area for cabin crew.

inspectionZones.label: Meal Cart Storage
inspectionZones.description: Standardized ATLAS containers hold pre-prepared meals for up to 300 passengers.

annotation.title: Aircraft Galley Systems
annotation.description: Modern aircraft galleys feature convection ovens, steam injection systems, espresso machines, and water boilers. The modular design allows airlines to customize layouts for different service levels and route durations.
